basics.name: Junjian Chen
basics.label: Software Developer
basics.summary: I am a computer engineering graduate student at the University of Toronto and recently completed my Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering from McGill University in May 2023.

work.name: Volante System
work.summary: Developed and maintained the frontend part of company's software products, including the POS system, back office, and customer-facing kiosk. Worked with the team to develop new features and fix bugs.

work.name: YITU Technology
work.summary: Specialized in backend development using Spring Cloud to build and maintain advertising interfaces, implement advertisement APIs, integrate external content, and execute data caching with Redis, contributing to an 8% revenue increase.

awards.title: Best AI for Commerce (Stonks) Winner at MAIS Hacks 2021
awards.summary: Awarded to the team that developed the best AI project for commerce at the McGill Artificial Intelligence Society (MAIS) Hacks 2021 hackathon.

awards.title: Excellence Bursary for Computer Science, Computer Engineering and Computer Construction, and Electrical, Electronic and Communications Engineering 2020-2021
awards.awarder: Ministère de l'Enseignement supérieur (MES), McGill University
awards.summary: Awarded to students who have demonstrated academic excellence in the field of computer engineering during the 2020-2021 academic year.

projects.name: University Attendance Tracker
projects.summary: A cloud-based student attendance tracking system using the MongoDB, React, Express, and Node.js (MERN) stack, improving attendance accuracy and reducing manual errors.

projects.name: Minimalist Blockchain System for Scalability Study
projects.summary: Develop a minimalist blockchain system closely following the Bitcoin design in C and CMake, aiming to study the scalability of blockchain systems.

projects.name: BusyTiger Shop: An Online Trading Platform
projects.summary: An marketplace platform that allows users to buy and sell products, developed using Spring Boot, MySQL, and Vue, providing a user-friendly interface and secure transactions.

projects.name: Library Management System
projects.summary: A library management system that allows users to borrow, return, and reserve books, developed using Java, ORM, and Vue, providing a user-friendly interface and secure transactions.
